title: Verify existing implementation of slugify utility
description: The task requested creating `slugify(text: string): string` in `src/utils/slug.ts` with tests. Both `src/utils/slugify.ts` and `src/utils/slugify.test.ts` already exist with a full implementation covering lowercase, hyphen replacement, unicode normalization, special char stripping, and comprehensive tests.
existing_patterns: src/utils/slugify.ts — single-function utility module with normalize/NFD unicode handling, toLowerCase, regex replacements for special chars/spaces/hyphens, and leading/trailing hyphen stripping

src/utils/slugify.test.ts — co-located vitest test file with describe/it/expect structure, covering basic transformation, accented chars, unicode, special chars, edge cases (empty, null, numbers, underscores)
